sentences.situation: Use when you are heading somewhere.

sentences.english: Could you speak a little slower?
sentences.situation: Use when you need clearer listening support.

sentences.english: I was wondering if you could help me with this.
sentences.korean: 이거 좀 도와주실 수 있는지 궁금했어요.
sentences.situation: A polite and natural request for help.

sentences.english: The app keeps crashing whenever I open it.
sentences.korean: 그 앱은 열기만 하면 계속 멈춰.
sentences.situation: Useful for reporting a technical issue.

sentences.english: This is the kind of practice that pays off over time.
sentences.korean: 이런 연습은 시간이 지나면 분명 효과가 있어.
sentences.situation: A motivating sentence for learning consistency.
